country.name: Laos
country.tip: Local weaving, basketry and paper crafts make light luggage-friendly gifts.
country.chinese_tip: 织物、竹编和桑皮纸工艺品轻便，也很适合送礼。

products.name: Hmong embroidery pouch
products.note: Check the stitching and ask who made it.
products.description: Hmong embroidery pouch is a compact wearable keepsake that brings a traditional local craft into everyday use.
products.why_buy: A useful souvenir with more local character than a standard tourist trinket.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually imported at a 30–70% premium, when stocked at all.
products.savings: Buy locally to avoid import mark-ups and get the widest choice.
products.airport_availability: Limited at airports; buy in town for the best choice and price.
products.online_availability: Available from selected specialist marketplaces, but provenance and prices vary.

reviews.body: Packed well and made a thoughtful gift. I would buy it again from a local shop.
Good value compared with imported options; check the label and keep the receipt.

products.name: Lao coffee
products.note: Choose sealed ground coffee or beans.
products.description: Lao coffee is a packable local pantry gift with flavours that are hard to find outside Laos.
products.why_buy: Easy to share, lightweight to pack, and best bought where it is made.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually imported at a 30–70% premium, when stocked at all.
products.savings: Buy locally to avoid import mark-ups and get the widest choice.
products.airport_availability: Often available in selected airport food or duty-free shops; check stock before departure.
products.online_availability: Sometimes sold by specialist grocers and marketplaces; check freshness and import rules.

reviews.body: Packed well and made a thoughtful gift. I would buy it again from a local shop.
Good value compared with imported options; check the label and keep the receipt.
